tier_remaining_note: Fully recomputed from a live disk-reconciled rerun of generate_build_plan_v2.py's scoring model on 2026-07-17 (ROUTES_DIR fixed locally to the non-Windows path for this run only, the script file on disk still has the Windows-style path and needs a permanent fix). Tier A's 12 remaining pairs are all Iceland corridors with UK/US/Australia/UAE/Canada, deliberately left unbuilt across chunks 85-87 since those chunks targeted Tier B; a future chunk should close these out given they outscore every Tier B pair. Not yet covered by verify_build_state.py's automatic disk reconciliation (only route_pairs/blog/total_markdown_files are); re-run the generator manually each chunk until that gap is closed.
notes: Chunk 87 DONE (Template B, Tier B, 50 new routes, 2 blocks, one batch). Built via 12 parallel research agents, one per country/cluster, taking the 50 highest-scored unbuilt Tier B pairs from a disk-reconciled rerun of generate_build_plan_v2.py's scoring model (6,621 built, Tier A=12, Tier B=571 remaining before this chunk). One agent (Australia-Zambia/Macau-Singapore) initially stalled by spawning a nested background sub-agent and returning without writing any files; resumed directly with an instruction to do its own research synchronously, after which it completed cleanly. Countries covered: Angola, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cameroon, Eswatini, Ivory Coast, Kosovo, Kyrgyzstan, Lesotho, Madagascar, Malawi, Moldova, Mongolia, Montenegro, Mozambique, North Macedonia, Senegal, Tajikistan and Turkmenistan (18 brand-new countries on the site, zero prior pages: each gained both its UK and US legs, 36 routes); Angola additionally gained the reverse UK-to-Angola leg (3 routes total); Belarus gained its US leg plus the outstanding UK-to-Belarus leg deliberately deferred by chunks 82-83 (2 routes); Albania, Algeria and Bahamas each gained their US leg to complete existing UK-only coverage (3 routes); Suriname gained both UAE directions (2 routes); Belize and Botswana each gained their missing UAE-to-X leg to complete the reverse X-to-UAE pages chunk 85-86 already shipped (2 routes); Australia and Zambia gained both directions of a new pair (2 routes); Macau and Singapore gained both directions of a new pair (2 routes). Genuine differentiators found: Belize's UAE MOCCAE export permit (30 days) is a tighter deadline than BAHA's 90-day import permit on the same corridor, a real cross-directional timing mismatch. Botswana's DVS needs no titre test from any origin, a sharp contrast with MOCCAE's own titre requirement on the reverse leg. Lesotho and Eswatini are both landlocked/enclave states with no long-haul air service of their own, so every pet transits Johannesburg on a mandatory two-airline handoff. Cameroon-US and Eswatini-US both hinge on landing at one of only six CDC-registered animal care facility airports, with United's Johannesburg-Newark nonstop specifically failing that test while Delta's Johannesburg-Atlanta nonstop passes. Turkmenistan bars the Alabai (Central Asian Shepherd) from export as a national symbol. Air China suspended dog (not cat) transport to the US from 1 February 2025, closing the obvious Beijing routing for Mongolia. Qatar Airways' October 2025 Doha-Lilongwe codeshare opened a new CDC-facility-qualifying routing for Malawi that didn't exist in earlier research. Wizz Air and Ryanair, the cheapest options into several Balkan capitals, carry no pets at all, a real trap repeated across Moldova, Bosnia and North Macedonia pages. Delta's cargo programme is currently restricted to US military/State Department moves only, ruling out its Dakar-JFK and Atlanta nonstops for ordinary Senegal and Eswatini owners despite the routes existing. Montenegro is UK-unlisted (titre test required) but absent from the CDC high-risk list (no titre needed into the US), a genuine cross-regulator asymmetry from the same origin country. Macau is not on Singapore's AVS Schedule I or II, so it defaults to Schedule III (titre test plus 30-day quarantine) despite neither being a distant or high-risk market. One research agent independently caught and discarded a hallucinated 'EU Regulation 2026/636' Montenegro citation after a direct source fetch didn't support it, rather than publishing it. QA pass after the agents finished caught and fixed: one invalid route_complexity token ('medium' is not in the low/moderate/high/very_high set, corrected to 'moderate' on australia-to-zambia.md) and three meta descriptions over the 160-character budget (cameroon-to-united-states.md, eswatini-to-united-kingdom.md, eswatini-to-united-states.md, all trimmed). All 50 files QA-scanned clean after those fixes (zero em dashes; zero banned vocabulary, the only flagged hits were the legitimate 'PetEmbark' brand name, consistent with prior chunks' precedent; correct Marcus Webb persona on all 50; valid keyed-map YAML for every requirements block verified with a Python parser, including a full type-check confirming no list-vs-map errors of the kind that broke a build in the 2026-06-11 ERRORS.md incident; all route_data fields populated using only the template's rendering-whitelisted keys; route_complexity restricted to the valid tokens; every sideways link verified against real files on disk, zero broken links; all 50 titles and descriptions confirmed unique; slug fields matched filenames on all 50; opening sentences independently varied and fact-led, no templated 'Moving a pet from X to Y' skeleton on any of the 50). Routes 6,621 -> 6,671, pages 7,427 -> 7,477. Chunk 88 (Template C, Tier B) is next; 12 higher-scored Tier A Iceland pairs remain unbuilt and should be prioritised in an upcoming chunk.
_previous_notes_chunk_85_86: Chunks 85-86 DONE (Template E + Template A, Tier B, 50 new routes, 2 blocks, one batch). Countries covered: Laos, Seychelles, Trinidad and Tobago (Canada leg, both directions); Iceland (brand new, Germany/France/Singapore both directions, 6 routes); Barbados (US/Australia both directions, 4 routes); Belize (brand new, 7 routes); Botswana (brand new, 7 routes); Guyana and Namibia (US/Australia both directions, 4 routes each); Suriname (brand new, 6 routes); Zambia (US both directions, 2 routes); Macau (Germany both directions, 2 routes); Venezuela (Canada both directions, 2 routes). Iceland's MAST enforces mandatory 14-day quarantine for every incoming pet regardless of origin, contradicting the site's existing iceland-pet-import-guide.md and icelandair.md, flagged not fixed. Belize surfaced a live 2024-2025 New World Screwworm re-emergence triggering a US-bound screwworm certificate. Barbados verified DAFF Group 2 (no titre), contrasting Trinidad/Jamaica/Bahamas/Bermuda's Group 3. QA caught belize-to-united-states.md and united-states-to-belize.md written with the wrong template_variant, corrected before commit. Routes 6,571 -> 6,621, pages 7,377 -> 7,427. Chunk 87 (Template B, Tier B) was next.
_previous_notes_chunk_84: Chunk 84 DONE (Template D, Tier B, 50 new routes, 2 blocks, one batch). Closed the Australia/UAE/Canada reciprocal gap for the 12-country Tier B cluster opened by the UK (chunk 80), US (chunk 81) and partial Canada/UAE (chunks 82-83) runs: Bolivia, El Salvador, Fiji, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, Paraguay, Russia, Serbia, Tunisia, Ukraine and Venezuela. Fiji was independently verified as DAFF-approved (Group 2) and MOCCAE low-risk-listed while still carrying its own mandatory BAF entry quarantine. Serbia is DAFF Group 3 approved despite Air Serbia excluding pets from its Belgrade-Dubai and Belgrade-UK routes. Russia-UAE reopened via Aeroflot/FlyDubai after a partial ceasefire; Ukraine still routes overland to Poland. Venezuela's Caracas airport earthquake closure (24 June 2026) was re-verified as still in effect. Routes 6,521 -> 6,571, pages 7,327 -> 7,377. Chunk 85 (Template E, Tier B) is next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
_dropped_from_rolling_window: Chunks 80, 81 and 82-83 notes were dropped to cap file growth (git history still has them in full at commits 4ecac2f1, 3741f752 and ef4d776e). A rolling window of the two most recent previous-chunk notes (currently chunks 85-86 and chunk 84) is kept going forward.
